channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-24 06:39 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Soros wants to end Western Civilization
item.description: Soros wants to end Western Civilization

item.title: @elonmusk: Accusations of racism have been weaponized to stop criticism and common sense. No more.
item.description: Accusations of racism have been weaponized to stop criticism and common sense. No more.

item.title: @elonmusk: First Southwest Airlines flight with Starlink!
item.description: First Southwest Airlines flight with Starlink!

item.title: @elonmusk: You can map the collapse of the West by its denial of the True, then the Good, and finally the Beaut...
item.description: You can map the collapse of the West by its denial of the True, then the Good, and finally the Beautiful. All that’s left to replace them are power, performance, and pleasure.

item.title: @elonmusk: More riddles for@RoKhanna. The President of El Salvador came to the same conclusion as DOGE and cele...
item.description: More riddles for@RoKhanna. The President of El Salvador came to the same conclusion as DOGE and celebrated the shutdown of USAID. Are you accusing the President who reduced his country’s murder rate by 95% of supporting the murder of children?

item.title: @elonmusk: If you are asking “Why push back against anti-datacenter efforts?” I consider it a tragedy that anti...
item.description: If you are asking “Why push back against anti-datacenter efforts?” I consider it a tragedy that anti-nuclear efforts largely strangled nuclear power in the US based on vibes, and I don’t want to see that happen to AI. Public opinion matters, and it shouldn’t be ceded unchallenged. If you are asking “Why should I support AI efforts at all?” I believe we are in the midst of a transition more vibrant than the industrial revolution. Opinions formed a couple of years ago about the uselessness of AI are no longer valid. Millions of people and organizations are getting great returns from using it, and the demand for data centers is the market responding to the value signal. That is how progress is made!

item.title: @elonmusk: USAID and other shady leftist charities used real suffering as a human shield for leftist graft! Alm...
item.description: USAID and other shady leftist charities used real suffering as a human shield for leftist graft! Almost 57% of USAID money to Haiti was...spent inside the DC Beltway. Just 2% made it to Haiti.

item.title: @elonmusk: 460 criminal charges $6.5B intended loss, $1.4B actual loss $127M seized assets Great work by@SecKen...
item.description: 460 criminal charges $6.5B intended loss, $1.4B actual loss $127M seized assets Great work by@SecKennedy,@DAGToddBlanche,@FBIDirectorKash, &@DrOzCMSon today’s fraud takedown. If you’re committing fraud, we’ll find you.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon confirms "Starmind" will be the official name of@SpaceX's AI satellite constellation. Earlier t...
item.description: Elon confirms "Starmind" will be the official name of@SpaceX's AI satellite constellation. Earlier this year, SpaceX filed a request with the FCC to launch and operate a constellation of 1 million AI satellites. SpaceX's AI1 satellite:

item.title: @elonmusk: USAID funded the Wuhan lab Wuhan lab created SARS-CoV-2 Wuhan lab was making more viruses DOGE defun...
item.description: USAID funded the Wuhan lab Wuhan lab created SARS-CoV-2 Wuhan lab was making more viruses DOGE defunded USAID DOGE may have been the most important pandemic prevention agency of the past century

item.title: @elonmusk: If your sole value is identity, then someone else will use a more extreme identity to displace you.
item.description: If your sole value is identity, then someone else will use a more extreme identity to displace you.

item.title: @elonmusk: All DOGE required was contact information of the recipients to confirm that funding was not fraudule...
item.description: All DOGE required was contact information of the recipients to confirm that funding was not fraudulent. No validated medical funding was stopped. Anything that appeared to be legitimate lifesaving funding continued and is now administered by the State Department. If anyone had actually died as a result of DOGE, their names would be worldwide headline news! On the other hand, USAID did help fund the Wuhan Virology Institute, which caused the deaths of millions, and the revolution that started the Russia-Ukraine war.
